calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Broward County Public Schools is Tuesday, August 10, 2027. BCPS begins in early August to ensure 180 instructional days are completed by late May — before the Atlantic hurricane season reaches its peak — while also accounting for the three no-school days in September for Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur that are not on neighboring district calendars.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028 is Friday, May 31, 2028. The school year runs from August through May, covering 180 instructional days. Families booking summer programs, camps, or travel should note that the May 31 end date can shift if hurricane makeup days are used — use flexible bookings for late May and early June.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Spring Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028 runs Monday, March 13 through Friday, March 17, 2028 — five days. This is one of the earliest Spring Break windows in recent BCPS history. Easter Sunday falls March 31, 2028, placing it two weeks after BCPS's spring break ends. As a result, FLL flights and Port Everglades cruise sailings have not yet hit their Easter-week peak during the BCPS break window, which can make early-March travel comparatively more affordable. Miami-Dade County Public Schools and Palm Beach County School District set their spring breaks independently — check both before booking South Florida travel.

calendarFaqs.q: When are Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur no-school days in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: In 2027-2028, Broward County Public Schools observes three no-school days for the Jewish High Holidays: Rosh Hashanah on Monday, September 21 and Tuesday, September 22, 2027, and Yom Kippur on Thursday, September 30, 2027. Schools are closed on all three dates. These closures are unique to BCPS among large South Florida districts — Miami-Dade County Public Schools and Palm Beach County School District do not observe these holidays as district-wide no-school days. Families coordinating with other South Florida districts should plan childcare specifically for September 21, 22, and 30.

calendarFaqs.q: Does BCPS take the full Thanksgiving week off in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. In 2027-2028, Broward County Public Schools closes for the entire Thanksgiving week: Monday, November 22 through Friday, November 26, 2027. This is five full school days — more than the two days (Thursday and Friday) that many other districts observe. Families can plan full-week Thanksgiving travel without pulling students from school. Classes resume Monday, December 1, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Winter Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter Break for Broward County Public Schools in 2027-2028 runs Saturday, December 20, 2027 through Saturday, January 1, 2028 — 13 days. Students return Thursday, January 4, 2028; January 3 is a teacher planning day. Fort Lauderdale–Hollywood International Airport (FLL) sees some of its highest annual demand during the week before Winter Break and the days after New Year's — book holiday flights early once the calendar is confirmed.

calendarFaqs.q: How many school days does BCPS have in 2027-2028?
calendarFaqs.a: Broward County Public Schools has 180 instructional days and 196 total teacher work days in 2027-2028. The 16 additional teacher days include pre-school-year planning, professional development, and post-school-year activities. Florida law requires 180 student instructional days, which BCPS meets in the August 10, 2027 to May 31, 2028 school year.

yearNumbers.label: Longer Winter Break
yearNumbers.detail: Winter Break runs Dec 20–Jan 1 (13 days) vs 12 days in 2026-2027, with students returning Jan 4 after a teacher planning day on Jan 3. FLL typically sees some of its highest annual traffic during the week before Winter Break — book holiday flights once the calendar is confirmed.

yearNumbers.label: Early Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break falls in the second week of March — earlier than most recent BCPS years and before Easter (March 31). South Florida hotels and cruise sailings often see lower demand in early March than during Easter week itself, so booking during the BCPS window may offer more availability than typical spring break timing.

calendarNotes:
Broward County Public Schools begins the 2027–2028 school year on Tuesday, August 10, 2027. Florida requires 180 student instructional days, and BCPS schedules an early August start to build in hurricane makeup day buffer and to absorb the three September no-school days for the Jewish High Holidays — Rosh Hashanah (September 21–22) and Yom Kippur (September 30) — that neighboring Miami-Dade and Palm Beach districts do not observe. The school year closes May 31, 2028, before Atlantic hurricane season approaches its late-summer peak.

Rosh Hashanah and Yom Kippur are official no-school days in BCPS, and in 2027–2028 they fall in a concentrated window: September 21 (Monday), September 22 (Tuesday), and September 30 (Thursday). All three are district-wide closures. This is one of the most distinctive features of the BCPS academic calendar, directly reflecting the substantial Jewish community in Broward County cities including Weston, Coral Springs, and Tamarac. Families who have recently moved from Miami-Dade or Palm Beach should note these closures specifically — childcare arrangements that covered those districts may not apply to the September and October BCPS closure dates.

Spring Break 2027–2028 runs March 13–17 — one of the earliest BCPS spring break windows in recent years. The Broward School Board anchors spring break after the required Florida Assessment of Student Thinking (FAST) testing window, so break timing shifts year to year as the testing calendar and Easter date change. In 2027–2028, Easter Sunday falls March 31 — two weeks after BCPS's spring break ends. This timing can be favorable for travel: South Florida hotels, FLL flights, and Port Everglades cruise sailings often see higher demand during Easter week than in the weeks before it, and the BCPS break in the second week of March typically falls before that elevated-demand window. Families comparing spring break windows should verify Miami-Dade and Palm Beach dates separately, as all three South Florida districts set calendars independently.

Thanksgiving Break 2027–2028 is the full school week — Monday, November 22 through Friday, November 26. BCPS observes five consecutive no-school days for Thanksgiving rather than the two or three days common in many other districts. BCPS does not schedule a separate fall break in October; the full Thanksgiving week closure effectively serves that function. Students return December 1, 2027.

Winter Break runs December 20, 2027 through January 1, 2028 — 13 days, one day longer than the prior year. Students return January 4 rather than January 2, because January 3 is a teacher planning day for first-semester grade submissions and professional development. Fort Lauderdale–Hollywood International Airport (FLL) typically sees some of its highest annual passenger volumes during the week before Winter Break and the days after New Year's; book holiday flights early once the calendar is confirmed.
